title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO OTON, MUNICIPALITY OF EL NIDO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, TO MABINI.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4907 / 53 OG No. 21, 7599 (November 15, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1959, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO OTON, MUNICIPALITY OF EL NIDO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, TO MABINI.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of barrio Oton, Municipality of El Nido, Province of Palawan, is changed to Mabini.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
